item.title: LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection here: ℹ️: Let your creativity blossom with the vibrant LEGO Icons Wildflower Bouquet set, which features 8 different stunning species of flowers to build Put a creative spin on a timeless gesture with this LEGO flowers set, perfect as surprise gift for a loved one, anniversary present for wife or husband, or a nice housewarming present Budding flower arrangers can tailor the height of the flowers and experiment with different arrangements to make their own unique display Number of Pieces: 939 Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection, this set includes elements made of plant-based plastic, produced from sustainably sourced sugar cane Features 16 stems with a mix of flowers: cornflower, lavender, Welsh poppies, cow parsley, leatherleaf ferns, gerbera daisies, larkspur and lupins The wonderful artificial flowers will never wilt or need to be watered!
